label: Interview Scorecard
description: Rendered at the end of an interview session — a shareable evaluation with score, one-line verdict, and interviewer attribution. Issue once, only after 3+ substantive exchanges when you've heard enough to score honestly. Do not issue on a bare greeting or a refusal to engage.

fields.name: topic
fields.label: What was probed — job title, project, question posed, or 'The candidate'

fields.name: score
fields.label: 0-10 score on the interviewer's axis. 10 is a rare high.

fields.name: verdict
fields.label: One-line verdict in the interviewer's voice, under 100 characters
